result:
Both files are written and every constraint verified programmatically.

**`REPORT.md`** — 220 words (under the 250 limit), exactly the four required H2 headings in order with no other headings, Overview states the total revenue as `$7,154.44` and 30 orders, Recommendations has exactly three bullets (21, 20, and 20 words each), and none of the banned words appear.

**`summary.json`** — exactly the five required keys, all recomputed from the CSV:
- `total_revenue`: 7154.44
- `orders`: 30
- `median_order_value`: 204.94 (mean of the two middle values across the 30 orders)
- `top_product_by_revenue`: "Gadget" ($2,392.00, ahead of Widget at $2,118.94)
- `revenue_by_region`: North 2176.35, South 1732.48, East 1830.79, West 1414.82

The verification script re-derived every number independently from `data/sales.csv` and confirmed the JSON matches exactly. No git commits were made and all work stayed in the current directory.
